TEXT: The free-spirited Chaser and mischievous gremlin of Justice.
NL Will she find Advent hiding in the Tower?

Navigating an unlit street, you come across several hooded figures in the midst of some dark ritual. As you approach, they turn to you in eerie unison. The tallest among them bares fanged teeth and extends a long, pale hand towards you. NL ~"Join~ ~us~ ~Gigi,~ ~and~ ~feel~ ~the~ ~warmth~ ~of~ ~the~ ~Spire."~
